portfolio_item.title: Portfolio Item
portfolio_item.description: A project or work sample in the portfolio.

category.description: The category of the project (e.g., Social Media Design).

image.description: The URL of the project image.

link.description: An optional external link for the project.

createdAt.description: The time the project was added.

uid.description: The ID of the user who added the project.

imageUrl.description: The URL of the profile image.

bio.description: A short biography of the user.

updatedAt.description: The time the profile was updated.

profile.description: A collection containing the user profile (usually one document).
